# PERF-241 positive: ASN.1 marshal with time.Now on signing path
lang: go
file: PERF-241-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/asn1"
	"time"
)

func SignPayload(digest []byte) ([]byte, error) {
	_ = time.Now().UTC()
	type signedData struct {
		Digest []byte
	}
	return asn1.Marshal(signedData{Digest: digest})
}
